items.title: Contract: Annual Cybersecurity & Threat Monitoring
items.description: Looking for an IT security partner to manage firewalls, intrusion detection, and ongoing risk assessments for corporate infrastructure.

items.title: Contract: Multi-Year Custom Software Development
items.description: Searching for a reliable development partner for enterprise-grade software solutions. Collaboration includes design, development, and ongoing maintenance.

items.title: Contract: One-Time Supply of Laptops & Accessories
items.description: Looking to deliver 150 laptops and docking stations for a corporate office setup. Delivery required within 60 days.

items.title: Contract: Cloud Infrastructure Management
items.description: Seeking a partner for scalable and stable enterprise cloud infrastructure with 99.9% uptime SLA.

items.title: Contract: Monthly Blog & SEO Content Package
items.description: Need a content writer to produce 8 long-form SEO-optimised blog posts per month on music, technology, and culture.

items.title: Contract: Annual Financial Audit & Reporting
items.description: Looking for a certified accounting firm to handle annual financial audits, tax filings, and compliance reporting.

items.title: Contract: Treasury & Cash Management Advisory
items.description: Seeking an advisory firm to optimise our treasury operations and provide strategic cash flow management guidance.

items.title: Contract: Brand Refresh & UI/UX Redesign
items.description: Looking for a creative agency to lead a full brand refresh including logo, design system, and key landing page redesigns.

items.title: Contract: Global PR Campaign for Product Launch
items.description: Need a PR agency to manage global press coverage, influencer partnerships, and media outreach for our upcoming product launch.

items.title: Contract: Enterprise Network Infrastructure Setup
items.description: Looking for a network engineer to design and deploy a secure multi-site enterprise network with SD-WAN and zero-trust architecture.

items.title: Contract: DevOps & CI/CD Pipeline Automation
items.description: Seeking a DevOps contractor to build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, automate deployments, and improve release velocity.

items.title: Contract: Technical Documentation & API Guides
items.description: Need a technical writer to produce clear API documentation, developer guides, and integration tutorials for our SaaS platform.

items.title: Contract: Social Media Content Strategy & Copywriting
items.description: Looking for a copywriter to manage content calendars and write engaging posts across LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram.

items.title: Contract: Annual White Paper & Research Report Package
items.description: Seeking an experienced writer to produce 6 in-depth white papers and 4 industry research reports per year for thought leadership.

items.title: Contract: Monthly Bookkeeping & Payroll Processing
items.description: Need an accountant to handle monthly bookkeeping, payroll for 50 employees, and quarterly VAT returns.

items.title: Contract: R&D Tax Credit Claim Preparation
items.description: Looking for a specialist firm to identify qualifying R&D expenditure and prepare HMRC tax credit claims for the current fiscal year.

items.title: Contract: CFO Advisory & Financial Forecasting
items.description: Seeking a fractional CFO to build financial models, support investor reporting, and lead budget planning for Series A growth stage.

items.title: Contract: Payment Gateway Integration & Compliance
items.description: Looking for a fintech specialist to integrate a multi-currency payment gateway and ensure PCI-DSS compliance across all channels.

items.title: Contract: AML & KYC Compliance Programme
items.description: Need a compliance consultant to develop and maintain AML/KYC policies, conduct staff training, and liaise with regulators.

items.title: Contract: Investment Portfolio Risk Assessment
items.description: Seeking a risk analyst to perform quarterly portfolio stress tests, assess market exposure, and produce board-level risk reports.

items.title: Contract: Mobile App UI/UX Design System
items.description: Looking for a UI/UX designer to build a comprehensive design system for iOS and Android apps, including component library and style guide.

items.title: Contract: Product Video & Motion Graphics Production
items.description: Need a creative studio to produce a 90-second product explainer video and a series of social-ready motion graphics assets.

items.title: Contract: Ongoing Illustration & Icon Set Updates
items.description: Seeking a freelance illustrator to maintain and expand our custom icon library and produce editorial illustrations for blog and marketing.

items.title: Contract: Performance Marketing & Paid Media Management
items.description: Looking for a performance marketing agency to manage Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn campaigns with a focus on CAC reduction.

items.title: Contract: Influencer Marketing Campaign
items.description: Need an agency to identify, negotiate, and manage relationships with 20+ micro-influencers for a product seeding campaign.
